summary: Frontend testing completed for Yrvante website 'wij' to 'ik' voice change and other updates. All 9 requested features verified successfully. The freelancer tone is now consistently used across homepage, packages, calculator, and FAQ sections.
passed_tests: 1. Homepage uses 'ik' voice - 'Ik bouw geen website — ik zorg dat jouw bedrijf...' ✓
2. New logo displayed in navigation (from uploaded image: gwcgd4lw_Yrvante logo) ✓
3. Green glow button 'Beschikbaar voor nieuwe projecten' is visible with proper styling ✓
4. Stats section shows: €500 (Vanaf), 1-2 (Weken), ZZP (Persoonlijk) - NOT '100% tevreden' ✓
5. Hero animation loads without excessive black space (45vh/55vh viewport heights) ✓
6. WhyExpensive section says 'Waarom ben ik goedkoper?' (not 'wij') ✓
7. Calculator page Basis package says 'Snelle en veilige hosting' (NOT 'Vercel' or 'SSL') ✓
8. Packages page Pro package says 'Mijn meest gekozen optie voor groeiende bedrijven' (not 'Onze') ✓
9. FAQ section has 12 questions with 'ik' voice and correct content ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Voice change from 'wij/we' to 'ik' consistently applied across all pages
New LOGO_URL properly referenced in both LandingPage.jsx and HeroAnimation.jsx
Green glow button implemented with proper shadow styling (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(34,197,94,0.3)])
Stats section correctly updated to show €500, 1-2 Weken, ZZP instead of '100% tevreden'
Maintenance price correctly updated to €25/pm across all pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice change testing completed - all 'wij/we' changed to 'ik' for freelancer tone. New logo from uploaded image is being used. Stats show €500, 1-2 Weken, ZZP (not 100% tevreden). Maintenance price is €25/pm. Green glow button for 'Beschikbaar' working. Hero animation uses 45vh/55vh viewport heights for proper sizing.
